meta.title: CxOPack — Your AI C-suite. Works everywhere.
meta.description: Build your startup solo with an AI executive team. CEO, CTO, CFO, Sales, CMO — as skills, subagents, and Custom GPTs. Works in Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Windsurf.

hero.badge: AN AI C-SUITE · IN A PACK
hero.subtitle: CEO · CTO · CFO · Head of Sales · CMO — production-grade AI executive kits that work in Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, any tool.
hero.socialProof: Production-grade workflows. Tested in real startups. Updated continuously.

problem.title: You can't hire a C-suite. You also can't do it all alone.
problem.body: A real CEO, CTO, CFO, head of sales, and CMO would cost half a million dollars a year. Most solo founders end up doing some of the work badly, ignoring the rest, and burning out. Generic AI helps — but only when you know exactly how to ask. CxOPack is the playbook: proven workflows for every executive function, installed in one click, working in whatever AI tool you already use.

multiplatform.title: Same agents. Any AI tool.
multiplatform.body: Most AI kits lock you into one product. CxOPack ships every workflow in four formats so it works wherever you already work.

claude.title: Claude
claude.desc: Skills, subagents, slash commands, MCP integrations.

chatgpt.title: ChatGPT
chatgpt.desc: Custom GPT configs, Project instructions, Actions (OpenAPI).

cursor.title: Cursor / Windsurf
cursor.desc: Rules files and prompts — drop into .cursor/rules.

agnostic.title: Anywhere else
agnostic.desc: Plain-markdown prompts. Paste into any LLM, any tool.

week.title: One founder. Five executives. One ritual.
week.subtitle: This is what running a startup with CxOPack actually looks like — five touchpoints across the week, one shared workspace that compounds.

board.title: Five kits isn't the product. A team is.
board.subtitle: CxOPack ships with a Chief of Staff that routes any request to the right executive, synthesizes one answer, and manages structured handoffs between them. Your 5 agents don't just coexist — they talk.

points.title: /founder routes anything
points.desc: Describe what's on your mind. Chief of Staff picks the executives that should weigh in, calls them in the right order, hands you one brief.

points.title: Weekly board meeting
points.desc: Monday ritual: all 5 personas give a read, Chief of Staff synthesizes, 3 priorities locked, handoffs queued, one provocative question.

points.title: Shared memory
points.desc: Every agent reads + writes to a single founder-log/ workspace — priorities, metrics, decisions, handoffs. Context lives in one place.

kits.title: Five executive roles. Five agents. One pack.
kits.subtitle: Each kit is a private GitHub repo with skills, subagents, Custom GPTs, Cursor rules, and raw prompts. Installed in 30 seconds. All-Access subscribers get every new kit automatically.

cfo.title: CFO Kit
items: SaaS metrics agent (MRR, ARR, CAC, LTV)

pricing.title: One CEO costs €500k. This costs €149.
pricing.subtitle: Three plans. Pick what you need today; grow into the rest. 14-day money-back, no questions.

solo.title: Solo Kit
solo.desc: Pick any one of the 5 kits. Lifetime access to that role's skills. Upgrade to All-Access anytime — we credit what you paid.
features: One executive role of your choice

allAccess.badge: Most popular — saves €96 today, more tomorrow
allAccess.title: All-Access Pass
allAccess.desc: Every current and future kit. The Board orchestration layer. Monthly new skill drops. Private community. The flywheel — value compounds every release.
features: Every current kit (CEO, CTO, CFO, Sales, CMO) — and every future kit free
The Board — Chief of Staff (Sam) + 5 persona agents

launch100.title: Launch 100
launch100.desc: The same All-Access Pass — but the first 100 buyers lock in €99/year for as long as they stay subscribed. Price never goes up. Quietly the best deal we'll ever offer.
features: Direct line to the founder for product feedback

autopilotTeaser.title: Autopilot
autopilotTeaser.desc: Your agents stop being assistants and become operators. Real budgets. Real MCPs. They run outbound, deploy code, write content, watch metrics — autonomously, with weekly audits to you. The first agent-operated company tier.

how.title: From purchase to first workflow in 2 minutes.

steps.title: Pick your plan
steps.desc: Solo Kit (€49 lifetime), All-Access Pass (€149/yr), or Launch 100 (€99/yr forever). Pay with Stripe.

steps.title: Get an instant email
steps.desc: GitHub invite to the private repos + a setup guide. Lands in 30 seconds.

steps.title: Install in your AI tool
steps.desc: 30 seconds for Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, or Windsurf. Instructions per platform.

steps.title: Run your first workflow
steps.desc: Draft an investor update, board review, or outbound campaign — or type /founder to let Sam route it.

items.q: Do I need both Claude and ChatGPT?
items.a: No. Each kit ships in four formats (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, raw prompts) so you can use whichever AI tool you already pay for. One tool is enough.

items.q: I'm already using Claude Code / Cursor. Does this just drop in?
items.a: Yes. Clone the repo, copy the skills folder into your project, and restart your tool. Detailed guides in each repo.

items.q: Is it actually used in real startups?
items.a: Yes. Every workflow is validated in production environments before release. The kits ship with example outputs, anti-patterns, and concrete pitfalls — not theoretical recipes.

items.q: What happens if I buy a Solo Kit and want more later?
items.a: Any Solo Kit purchase (€49) credits in full toward an All-Access Pass upgrade. Email hello@cxopack.com — we adjust your subscription billing.

items.q: What's the difference between All-Access Pass and Launch 100?
items.a: Same product, two prices. All-Access is €149/year. Launch 100 is €99/year locked for life — but only the first 100 subscribers get it. Once we hit 100, it's gone forever.
Yes. 14 days, no questions, full refund. Subscription? Cancel anytime through your account; you keep access until the end of your billing period.

Coming Q4 2026. Your agents stop being assistants and become operators with real budgets and MCP connections — they run outbound, deploy code, write content autonomously, with weekly audits to you. Join the waitlist on the landing page.

items.q: Can my team use a single license?
items.a: Single-seat per buyer. Team seats (3+) coming with All-Access — email hello@cxopack.com if you need them today.

cta.title: Your AI board is waiting.
cta.subtitle: Stop doing every job yourself. Stop hiring too early. Install your C-suite in the next 5 minutes.
